# Pomodorian

> AI-powered Pomodoro focus timer. Plan smarter, focus deeper.

## What is Pomodorian?

Pomodorian is a free, modern Pomodoro timer web app with AI-powered session planning, built-in ambient sounds, and focus analytics. It helps users break down goals into focused work sessions using the Pomodoro Technique.

## Key Features

- **AI Session Planner**: Describe your goal in natural language, and AI (Claude) creates a structured task list with pomodoro time estimates. Supports 8 languages.
- **Pomodoro Timer**: Customizable focus/break durations with circular SVG progress ring. Auto-advances between sessions.
- **Ambient Sounds**: 5 layerable sounds — rain, cafe, lo-fi, nature, fireplace — all free, with individual volume controls.
- **Focus Analytics**: Session history, daily focus stats, streak tracking, and a GitHub-style contribution heatmap.
- **Keyboard Shortcuts**: Space (start/pause), 1/2/3 (switch modes), S (settings), R (analytics).
- **PWA**: Installable as a standalone app, works offline.
- **Dark & Light Mode**: Glassmorphism design with smooth Framer Motion animations.

## Who is it for?

- Students studying for exams
- Software developers doing deep work
- Writers and creatives needing focused sessions
- Freelancers tracking productive time
- Anyone using or learning the Pomodoro Technique

## Technical Details

- Built with Next.js, React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS
- AI powered by Claude (Anthropic)
- Deployed on Vercel
- All data stored locally in the browser (privacy-first)
- No account required

## URL

https://pomodorian.app

## Comparison with Alternatives

Pomodorian differentiates from Pomofocus, Forest, Focus To-Do, and other timers by offering:
1. AI task planning (unique feature)
2. Free built-in ambient sounds (5 sounds, layerable)
3. No account required
4. Works offline as a PWA
5. Modern glassmorphism design

## Pricing

Free. No ads. No account required.
